code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 13
end

fn read_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = read_or_empty()
  let line2 = read_or_empty()

  let t = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    0
  end

  let n = string.len(line1)
  mut i = 0
  mut tok = ""
  mut out = ""
  mut first = true

  while i <= n
    mut flush = false
    if i == n
      flush = true
    else
      match string.byte_at(line1, i)
      when Some(b)
        if is_ws(b)
          flush = true
        else
          tok = "#{tok}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        end
      when None
        flush = true
      end
    end

    if flush
      if not string.is_empty(tok)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when Some(v)
          if v > t
            if first
              out = "#{v}"
              first = false
            else
              out = "#{out} #{v}"
            end
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        tok = ""
      end
    end

    i = i + 1
  end

  println(out)
end
